verdict.core_answer: Current ICSPB-Backbone-v2 training is no longer best described as blind hyperparameter search. Given constructive parameter theory closure, persistent daemon stability, and real-data training margins, training is now best understood as a strongly constrained constructive solve with calibration and convergence validation.
verdict.remaining_gap: 全局唯一闭式 theta* 与项目级常驻在线定理服务
